response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The Reference JSON incorrectly identified the first song as 'Nenenenenenenene Daibakusou!'; it is actually 'Perfect-area complete!'. Some lyrics in 'COOLISH WALK' also differed from the audio ('afternoon' vs 'night'). 2. JSON Usage: The Reference JSON was discarded for the first song and the talking segment; manual transcription and translation were performed. For the second song, it was used as a reference but adjusted for timing and accuracy. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are strictly anchored to vocal audio. On-screen song titles were included as visual events. Rapid song lyrics use instantaneous transitions to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: Perfect-area complete!
subtitles.english: [Song: Perfect-area complete!]

subtitles.english: is there a possibility?

subtitles.original: Yay! 誰だって 意味だって
subtitles.english: Yay! Whoever it is, whatever the meaning,

subtitles.english: is just barely in time, right?

subtitles.original: これから 始まる 季節に挨拶
subtitles.english: A greeting to the season that is about to begin.

subtitles.english: I'm starting now, My Life, My Life, My Life!

subtitles.original: 気がついた 時には
subtitles.english: By the time I realized it,

subtitles.original: 生まれてた なぜだろう?
subtitles.english: it was already born, I wonder why?

subtitles.english: Well, you see, consciousness

subtitles.original: もう育ちつつあるよ
subtitles.english: is already growing,

subtitles.original: 強く強くね
subtitles.english: Stronger and stronger.

subtitles.original: Wait 止まらない この気持ち
subtitles.english: Wait, this feeling won't stop,

subtitles.original: 私の勉強不足で
subtitles.english: With my lack of studying,

subtitles.original: 可能性 ありますか?
subtitles.english: is there a possibility?

subtitles.original: それとも 0点かな?
subtitles.english: Or will it be zero?

subtitles.original: No! やり直し 書き直し
subtitles.english: No! Redo it, rewrite it,

subtitles.original: 本気で まんまジャンピング
subtitles.english: Seriously, just as I am, jumping.

subtitles.english: Because there's a future more wonderful than now,

subtitles.original: 今より 素敵に My Life, My Life, My Life!
subtitles.english: More wonderfully than now, My Life, My Life, My Life!

subtitles.original: はい！というわけで始まりました！
subtitles.english: Alright! And so it has begun!

subtitles.original: 2026年桃鈴ねね誕生日ライブ、イェーイ！
subtitles.english: 2026 Momosuzu Nene Birthday Live, Yay!

subtitles.original: みんな、コメントも見えてるよ！ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Everyone, I can see your comments! Thank you!

subtitles.original: エコー気づいてくれた人ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you to those who noticed the echo!

subtitles.original: ねね、今回3Dライブだから！
subtitles.english: Nene, because it's a 3D live this time!

subtitles.original: はい、というわけで、今回のハッシュタグはこちら！

subtitles.original: #桃鈴ねね誕生日ライブ2026 です！

subtitles.original: 今ね、エゴサの機能がちょっとバグっちゃってるんで、

subtitles.original: こっちでツイートしてくれたらめっちゃ嬉しいです！よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: so I'd be really happy if you tweet with this! Thanks in advance!

subtitles.original: 今日はね、超重大告知があるので、最後まで楽しんでいってください！
subtitles.english: Today, there's a super major announcement, so please enjoy until the very end!

subtitles.original: さあ、今3曲お聞きいただいたんですけど、
subtitles.english: Now, you've just heard three songs,

subtitles.original: ねねの好きな曲、銀魂、バカテス、っていう感じで、
subtitles.english: Nene's favorite songs, like Gintama and BakaTest,

subtitles.original: もうねねの好きな曲しかない3曲をやりましたけど、
subtitles.english: I've performed three songs that are nothing but my favorites,

subtitles.original: 3曲目に一番、歌が、歌がきついの持ってきちゃって、
subtitles.english: but I brought the most vocally demanding one as the third song,

subtitles.original: ゼーハーゼーハーでございます。
subtitles.english: so I'm completely out of breath.

subtitles.original: というわけで、ここからはゲストパート入っていきます！
subtitles.english: So, from here on, we're moving into the guest part!

subtitles.original: それでは、VTR、レッツゴー！
subtitles.english: Now then, VTR, let's go!
